# add(_:)

**Instance Method**

Adds the specified list of rules to the system.

## Declaration

```swift
func add(_ rules: [GKRule])
```

## Parameters

- **rules**: An array of rule objects.

## Discussion

Adding rules to the system also adds them to the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRuleSystem/agenda] list, in decreasing order of the rules’ [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRule/salience] values. Rules with the same salience are added to the agenda in the order of the specified array.

## Related Documentation

- **agenda**: The list of rules to be considered when evaluating the system.

## Managing a System’s List of Rules

- **rules**: The list of rules to be executed when evaluating the system.
- **add(_:)**: Adds the specified rule to the system.
- **removeAllRules()**: Removes all rules from the system.
